hearty.name: Hearty
hearty.description: Gives +5 HEALTH and heals the player

flamethrower.name: Flamerthrower
flamethrower.description: Changes BULLET TYPE to Flames. DAMAGE can't be increased by other upgrades, Stack for stronger Flame and reach

plasma_rounds.name: Plasma Rounds
plasma_rounds.description: Changes BULLET TYPE to Plasma. Pierces enemies and has slight AOE, Stack for greater area

normalcy.name: Normalcy
normalcy.description: Reverts BULLET TYPE to standard non-explosive bullets and normal size

sulfuric_ammo.name: Sulfuric Ammo
sulfuric_ammo.description: +0.25 EXPLOSIVENESS, Only works with Normal BULLET TYPE

cailber_increase.name: Cailber Increase
cailber_increase.description: Makes your bullet bigger, Affects EXPLOSIVENESS, Only works with Normal BULLET TYPE

flashtime.name: Flashtime
flashtime.description: Slows the world down, Stack for slower world view and +2 ABILITY DURATION

detonation.name: Detonation
detonation.description: You can explode but -50 HEALTH, Stack for +0.5 DETONATION POWER and -4 ABILITY COOLDOWN (Faster)

dash.name: Dash
dash.description: You can dash to avoid damage and obstacles. Stack for faster and longer dash
